_comment: Phase 5 — recursive traversal expected projection. The schema interpreter normalizes the standalone song (item 0), the two collection-ref wrappers (items 1 + 2), and recursively normalizes their collection_content[] children. Aliasing rule: production wires sometimes emit raw column names (id/title/slug/status/metadata/recipes) on collection_content entries; the interpreter aliases these to the canonical content_* fields. The wrappers themselves don't pin a layer plan — their rendering is owned by the boot.js segment-title-card path (Phase 5), not the per-item layer-selector. We assert (a) standalone item 0 layers correctly, (b) wrappers preserve their collection metadata, (c) nested children are reachable + normalized.
